# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: enable-admin-interface
spec:
  configPatches:
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND # Match all inbound traffic from sidecars
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          route_config:
            virtual_hosts:
              - domains: ['*'] # Match all incoming requests
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: '/'
                    route:
                      cluster: inbound|9080 # Forward to the inbound listener on port 9080
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
          stat_prefix: ingress_http # Use a custom stat prefix for the inbound listener
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 10s
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 512
            max_requests_per_connection: 100
            max_response_headers_count: 100
          access_log:
            - format: '%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)% %PROTOCOL% %RESPONSE_CODE% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION%'
              filter: envoy.file_access_log
              config:
                path: /dev/stdout
          use_remote_address: true
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND # Match all outbound traffic from sidecars
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          route_config:
            virtual_hosts:
              - domains: ['*'] # Match all outgoing requests
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: '/'
                    route:
                      cluster: outbound|9080 # Forward to the outbound listener on port 9080
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
          stat_prefix: egress_http # Use a custom stat prefix for the outbound listener
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 10s
            max_connections: 1024
            max_pending_requests: 512
            max_requests_per_connection: 100
            max_response_headers_count: 100
          access_log:
            - format: '%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)% %PROTOCOL% %RESPONSE_CODE% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION%'
              filter: envoy.file_access_log
              config:
                path: /dev/stdout
          use_remote_address: true
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: GATEWAY # Match all traffic from the gateway
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          route_config:
            virtual_hosts:

          use_remote_address: true

      context: GATEWAY # Match all traffic from the gateway
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:

              filter: envoy.file_access_log
              config:
                path: /dev/stdout
          use_remote_address: true
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_INBOUND # Match all traffic from the sidecar inbound listener
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: local_service
                domains: ['*']
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: '/'
                    route:
                      cluster: inbound|9080 # Forward to the inbound listener on port 9080
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
          add_user_agent: true
          normalize_path: true
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
            max_connections: 1024
            max_requests_per_connection: 100
            max_response_headers_count: 100
          access_log:
            - format: '%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)% %PROTOCOL% %RESPONSE_CODE% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION%'
              filter: envoy.file_access_log
              config:
                path: /dev/stdout
          use_remote_address: true
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: SIDECAR_OUTBOUND # Match all traffic from the sidecar outbound listener
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:

                      prefix: '/'
                    route:
                      cluster: gateway|9080 # Forward to the gateway listener on port 9080
          http_filters:
            - name: envoy.router
              typed_config:
                '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
          add_user_agent: true
          normalize_path: true
          common_http_protocol_options:
            idle_timeout: 60s
            max_connections: 1024
            max_requests_per_connection: 100
            max_response_headers_count: 100
          access_log:
            - format: '%START_TIME% %RESP(X-Envoy-Upstream-Service-Time)% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-ORIGINAL-PATH?:PATH)% %PROTOCOL% %RESPONSE_CODE% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION%'
              filter: envoy.file_access_log
              config:
                path: /dev/stdout
          use_remote_address: true
  - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
    match:
      context: GATEWAY # Match all traffic from the gateway
    patch:
      operation: MERGE
      value:
        name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress
